Why are you interested? *
Describe a time you turned a difficult stakeholder into a champion. What was your approach, what evidence did you use, how did you measure the shift, and what was the long-term impact on team dynamics? This should be at least a few paragraphs. We really value storytelling and outcomes — please be thorough. Also, if you have worked with cross-functional teams before, mention that too. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.
